label: CIS Safeguard 7.1
title: Establish and Maintain a Vulnerability Management Process

prose.en: Establish and maintain a documented vulnerability management process for enterprise assets. Review and update documentation annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
A documented vulnerability management process is established and maintained for enterprise assets.
Documentation is reviewed and updated annually, or when significant enterprise changes occur that could impact this Safeguard.
